match.userMessage:
Classify music design for each scene and generate a unified music prompt for the sequence.

<SCENES>
[
  {
    "sceneId": "scene_001",
    "title": "Handheld Macro Keyboard",
    "storyBeat": "Establishes tense newsroom atmosphere and reporter at work",
    "durationSeconds": 4,
    "location": "INT. SLEEK NEWSROOM - NIGHT",
    "timeOfDay": "night",
    "visualSummary": "Focused energetic newsroom under deadline pressure with fresh sensory immediacy"
  },
  {
    "sceneId": "scene_002",
    "title": "Wide Desk Reveal",
    "storyBeat": "Reveals clean modern workspace environment",
    "durationSeconds": 3,
    "location": "INT. SLEEK NEWSROOM - NIGHT",
    "timeOfDay": "night",
    "visualSummary": "Fresh, calm, sensory, high-key and effortlessly cool under deadline pressure"
  },
  {
    "sceneId": "scene_003",
    "title": "Producer Enters Urgently",
    "storyBeat": "Interrupts calm with breaking news urgency",
    "durationSeconds": 6,
    "location": "INT. SLEEK NEWSROOM - NIGHT",
    "timeOfDay": "night",
    "visualSummary": "Energetic focused newsroom under deadline pressure, airy high-key mood with fresh sensory immediacy"
  },
  {
    "sceneId": "scene_004",
    "title": "Eye Macro Reaction",
    "storyBeat": "Shows reporter processing critical information",
    "durationSeconds": 4,
    "location": "INT. SLEEK NEWSROOM - NIGHT",
    "timeOfDay": "night",
    "visualSummary": "Urgent yet airy newsroom tension under deadline pressure, fresh and focused energy"
  },
  {
    "sceneId": "scene_005",
    "title": "Two-Shot Lock-In and Final Frame",
    "storyBeat": "Builds tension and resolves with on-screen breaking news",
    "durationSeconds": 7,
    "location": "INT. SLEEK NEWSROOM - NIGHT",
    "timeOfDay": "night",
    "visualSummary": "Energetic focused deadline tension with airy optimistic lighting mood."
  }
]
</SCENES>

For each scene, classify:
1. presence: "none"|"minimal"|"moderate"|"full"
2. style: Genre/instrumentation (if music present)
3. mood: Emotional quality (if music present)
4. atmosphere: Environmental atmosphere

Then synthesize unified tags (starting with "instrumental") and a 1-2 sentence prompt for one cohesive music track.

Respond with ONLY valid JSON matching the schema.
